content:
## User

Schedule jobs with FIFO start order, maximum concurrency four, and cancellation before a queued job starts.

## Assistant

A 250 ms polling loop was prototyped to look for free slots.

## User

Reject polling. Release the next FIFO waiter directly when a running job finishes.

## Assistant

The semaphore queue starts at most four jobs and preserves FIFO in the normal test.
